traits.name: Lightning Absorption
traits.description: No damage from Lightning; regains HP equal to Lightning damage dealt.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: Two Slam attacks. If both hit Medium or smaller creature, target Grappled (escape DC 14), and can use Engulf.

actions.name: Slam
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8+4) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Engulf
actions.description: One Medium or smaller Grappled creature: Engulfed (Blinded, Restrained, can't breathe). 13 (2d8+4) Bludgeoning at start of each mound's turns. If mound moves, engulfed creature moves with it. Can have one creature engulfed at a time.

enemies.name: Topiary Golem Ornamental
enemies.savingThrows: Str +3, Dex +3, Con +2, Int -4, Wis +0, Cha -5
enemies.immunities: Psychic; Charmed, Exhaustion, Frightened, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned
enemies.languages: Understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

traits.name: Hedgeblend
traits.description: The golem can move through hedges or other dense foliage without impediment, and can occupy their space.

traits.name: Golemcraft Ward (1/Day)
traits.description: When the golem fails a saving throw that would alter its form or incapacitate it, it can choose to succeed instead. The golem adds +3 to its saving throws against spells and magical effects for each use of this ability it has remaining.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The golem makes two attacks with its Manicured Slash.

actions.name: Manicured Slash
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the golem is Bloodied, this attack deals an additional 3 (1d6) Slashing damage on a hit.

bonusActions.name: Extend Roots
bonusActions.description: The golem drives its roots into the ground, becoming utterly immobile and gaining Tremorsense to a range of 90 feet until it ends this effect as a Bonus Action. While in this state, the golem is indistinguishable from an ordinary topiary.

enemies.notes: Natural Armor. Challenge Rating 3. Initiative +3. 5 ft. tall. Plant construct type. Obeys commands and drives based on Obedience.
